Board events: income 5; P2-guardian-3 captured center-center; P2-guardian-3 hit P1-guardian-6 for 4; P2-marksman-5 hit P1-guardian-5 for 4; recruited P2-guardian-5.

entries.summary: P1 income 6; P1-guardian-3 gained +1 attack; P1-guardian-3 hit P2-guardian-3 for 11; units 10-6 to 11-5, centers 4-4.
entries.reasoning: Pending unit-count threat after start check: P1. P1 followed the balanced economy/control assignment: hold central/eastern anchors, preserve guardians/marksmen/druids/healers, and test whether center-control threat rewards sustained center play fairly.
